summary: Comprehensive testing of Lamri & Lubart (5 components) and CCSP (3 poles, 3 degrees) integration into Passport Dynamique de Compétences. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new UI elements verified working - Évaluation tab, evaluation dialog with 5 sliders and radar chart preview, CCSP dropdowns, diagnostic generation with Lamri & Lubart profile radar, CCSP distribution bars, and recommendations.

console_warnings.issue: React setState warning during navigation: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component'
console_warnings.impact: No functional impact, cosmetic console warning only

console_warnings.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent

backend_api: GET /api/passport - passport loads correctly with new fields (components, ccsp_pole, ccsp_degree)
POST /api/passport/competences - adding competence with CCSP pole and degree
POST /api/passport/competences - works with all 3 CCSP poles (realisation, interaction, initiative)
POST /api/passport/competences - works with all 3 CCSP degrees (imitation, adaptation, transposition)
POST /api/passport/competences - competence can be added without CCSP (optional fields)
PUT /api/passport/competences/{id}/evaluate - evaluating with 5 Lamri & Lubart components (0-5)
PUT /api/passport/competences/{id}/evaluate - evaluating with CCSP pole and degree
PUT /api/passport/competences/{id}/evaluate - component values clamped to 0-5 range
GET /api/passport/diagnostic - returns empty profile for no competences
GET /api/passport/diagnostic - returns Lamri & Lubart profile averages and CCSP distribution
GET /api/passport/diagnostic - generates recommendations based on low scores
Competence has components field with all 5 keys in passport response
Competence has ccsp_pole and ccsp_degree fields in passport response
frontend_ui: Passport view loads at /dashboard/passeport with 7 tabs including new 'Évaluation' tab
Tabs visible: Profil, Compétences, Évaluation, Émergentes, Expériences, Parcours, Passerelles
Évaluation tab shows Lamri & Lubart explanation card with 5 components descriptions
Évaluation tab shows CCSP explanation card with 3 poles and 3 degrees
Évaluation tab shows 'Générer le diagnostic' button
Évaluation tab shows 'Compétences à évaluer' section with 'Évaluer' buttons
Add competence dialog has CCSP Classification section with Pôle and Degré dropdowns
Clicking 'Évaluer' opens evaluation dialog with competence name in title
Evaluation dialog shows 5 component sliders (Connaissance, Cognition, Conation, Affection, Sensori-moteur)
Evaluation dialog shows radar chart preview ('Profil de compétence')
Evaluation dialog shows CCSP selectors (Pôle de compétence, Degré de maîtrise)
Evaluation dialog shows 'Enregistrer l'évaluation' button
Saving evaluation updates the competence and closes dialog
'Générer le diagnostic' button loads diagnostic results
Diagnostic shows 'Votre Diagnostic' header with evaluated count
Diagnostic shows 'Profil Lamri & Lubart' radar chart with 5 axes
Diagnostic shows 'Pôles CCSP' horizontal bar chart
Diagnostic shows 'Degrés CCSP' horizontal bar chart
Diagnostic shows 'Recommandations' section with actionable suggestions
Competence cards show category badge (Technique), source badge (Déclaré)
Toast notifications work: 'Compétence ajoutée', 'Évaluation enregistrée'

seed_data_creation: Passport auto-created on GET. Ubuntoo signals aggregate into passport competences.
test_credentials: No credentials needed - anonymous authentication. Use POST /api/auth/anonymous with {role: 'particulier'} to get token
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lamri & Lubart (5 components) and CCSP (3 poles, 3 degrees) integration fully tested. Backend APIs: /api/passport loads with new fields, POST /api/passport/competences accepts CCSP classification, PUT /api/passport/competences/{id}/evaluate saves 5 components and CCSP, GET /api/passport/diagnostic returns profile averages and CCSP distribution with recommendations. Frontend: new Évaluation tab with framework explanations, evaluation dialog with 5 sliders and radar chart preview, CCSP dropdowns (Pôle, Degré), diagnostic view with Lamri & Lubart radar, CCSP bars, and recommendations. All working correctly.

features_verified.evaluate_components: ✓ Evaluation dialog has 5 sliders (Connaissance, Cognition, Conation, Affection, Sensori-moteur)
features_verified.evaluate_ccsp: ✓ Evaluation dialog has CCSP Pôle and Degré dropdowns
features_verified.radar_preview: ✓ Evaluation dialog shows radar chart preview of component profile
features_verified.diagnostic_lamri_lubart: ✓ Diagnostic shows Profil Lamri & Lubart radar chart with 5 axes
features_verified.diagnostic_ccsp_poles: ✓ Diagnostic shows Pôles CCSP horizontal bar chart (Réalisation, Interaction, Initiative)
features_verified.diagnostic_ccsp_degrees: ✓ Diagnostic shows Degrés CCSP horizontal bar chart (Imitation, Adaptation, Transposition)
features_verified.diagnostic_recommendations: ✓ Diagnostic shows Recommandations section with actionable suggestions
